title: Entry-Level / Apprentice / Intern
responsibilities: Learns foundational principles of software development and coding practices.
Assists in basic tasks like testing, documentation, and debugging under supervision.
Supports the development process by completing assigned tasks and shadowing team members.
description: Entry-level role. Learns software development fundamentals under close supervision, assists with testing, documentation, and debugging.

title: Junior Analyst
expected_skills: Coding in at least one language
responsibilities: Executes specific coding tasks with growing independence.
Produces deliverables under strict guidance and reviews by senior developers.
Supports testing, debugging, and minor enhancements of existing software.
description: Junior contributor executing specific coding tasks under strict guidance. Focuses on testing, debugging, and minor enhancements.

title: Analyst
expected_skills: Knowledge of software standards and tools
responsibilities: Codes components and modules with clear requirements and structure.
Collaborates with developers and functional leads for problem-solving.
Contributes to testing, troubleshooting, and optimization of applications.
Focus is on building expertise in software standards and tools.
description: Codes components and modules independently. Collaborates with leads, contributes to testing and optimization, builds domain expertise.

title: Senior Analyst
responsibilities: Manages small tasks/modules independently and coordinates with quality assurance.
Applies domain expertise to solve complex coding challenges.
Performs technical design and reviews for assigned modules.
Begins to mentor junior team members and contribute actively to the team's success.
description: Manages modules independently, performs technical design and reviews. Begins mentoring junior staff and applying domain expertise to complex problems.

title: Consultant / Team Lead
responsibilities: Leads the development of multiple components or a workstream.
Ensures coding standards, testing protocols, and design optimizations are followed.
Drives stakeholder collaboration and addresses escalations within the scope.
Coaches junior team members in technical and delivery aspects.
description: Leads workstreams and multiple components. Drives coding standards, stakeholder collaboration, and escalation resolution. Coaches junior team members.

title: Associate Manager
responsibilities: Owns the delivery and technical strategy of software development projects.
Manages resources, schedules, risks, and mitigations for successful delivery.
Provides guidance on architecture and design choices for projects.
Handles client interactions to align technical execution with business needs.
description: Owns project delivery and technical strategy. Manages resources, risks, and client interactions to align execution with business needs.

title: Manager
responsibilities: Sets technical direction and ensures delivery quality for software projects.
Develops strategies to optimize development and deployment processes.
Manages cross-team collaboration and ensures stakeholders' satisfaction.
Mentors teams and drives organizational goals at the project level.
description: Sets technical direction and delivery quality strategy. Optimizes development processes, manages cross-team collaboration, mentors project teams.

title: Senior Manager
responsibilities: Oversees large-scale software development initiatives across complex programs.
Focuses on value realization and performance metrics for client engagements.
Ensures smooth coordination across multiple locations and functions.
Drives continuous improvement in the software lifecycle and operating model.
description: Oversees complex, large-scale programs. Drives value realization, performance metrics, multi-location coordination, and continuous improvement.

title: Director
responsibilities: Shapes the strategic direction of software offerings and client innovations.
Owns enterprise-level risk management for software engagements.
Builds organizational leadership capabilities to manage large-scale delivery.
Sets the direction for high-impact, technically challenging projects.
description: Shapes strategic direction of software offerings. Owns enterprise risk, builds leadership capabilities, drives high-impact technically challenging projects.

title: Senior Director
responsibilities: Guides cross-functional collaborations, ensuring innovation delivery quality.
Forms strategies defining next-gen solutions with optimized architecture.
description: Guides cross-functional innovation and defines next-gen solution strategies with optimized architecture at enterprise scale.

title: Managing Director (MD)
responsibilities: Leads transformation at an enterprise scale focused on software technology goals.
Ensures business growth by advancing technical strategies.
description: Leads enterprise-scale transformation. Drives business growth through advanced technical strategies and organizational leadership.

title: Senior Managing Director (Senior MD)
responsibilities: Innovates strategies into futuristic software products aligned with industry trends.
Directs thought leadership impacting enterprise profitability.
description: Innovates strategies into futuristic products. Directs thought leadership aligned with industry trends that impacts enterprise profitability.

title: Global Executive MD / Enterprise Owner
responsibilities: Shapes software deployment frameworks impacting the entire organization.
Advises innovation ecosystems supporting governance.
description: Shapes organization-wide software deployment frameworks. Advises innovation ecosystems and governance at the highest executive level.
